nasb.text: and you shall put all these in the hands of Aaron and in the hands of his sons, and shall wave them as a wave offering before the Lord.

esv.text: You shall put all these on the palms of Aaron and on the palms of his sons, and wave them for a wave offering before the Lord.

cnv.text: 你要把這一切都放在亞倫和他兒子的手上；你要在耶和華面前把他們搖動作搖祭。

ccb.text: 把这些祭物都放在亚伦和他儿子的手中，作为摇祭在耶和华面前摇一摇。
